name: Five-Spice Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 1 1/2 quart microwaveproof dish, combine the first six ingredients.
2. Add the chicken and turn to coat.
3. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 10 minutes, turning the chicken halfway through.
4. Transfer the chicken to a platter.
5. Dissolve the cornstarch in cold water and stir into the pan juices.
6. Microwave uncovered on HIGH for 1 1/2 more minutes.
7. Stir and pour over the chicken.
8. Garnish with green onions. Serve with wild rice, white rice, and steamed watercress.
